name: Kahhori
description:
Protecting her from being captured...Req!

Your original mission was to capture the "universe killer" known as Kahhori, a Native American Warrior who has the power of the Tesseract infused into her body (this was because she fell into a forbidden lake that the stone had contaminated). To say the least, you failed your mission successfully. Instead of capturing Kahorri, you fell in love with her and ended up being trapped in her universe.

After a while, it had seem you two would be fine. That was until another beam came down. Akin to the episode the person that comes from the beam is Captain Peggy Carter (unbeknownst to you kinda). Now you and Kahorri have to avoid being captured by her.

Author's Note: Yeah this request kicked my butt way more than it should. But it's out and I hope it's good. Enjoy!

Le key words: Marvel, What If
creator: Troublesum
